title: SQL: crash: select cast( 1 as varchar(10))
key_bug_features: select cast with varchar type conversion
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.5);
SELECT cast(value as varchar(10)) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT cast(1 as varchar(10)) UNION SELECT cast(2 as varchar(10));
